name: claude-stop-envelope-taskid
description: #47 D2/D3/section 5.7: a Claude SubagentStop payload whose report transcript ends with a starcar-artifact envelope carrying `task-id: X` yields a `returned` record that pairs with its launch by subject=agent_id (mode b, subject_basis=runtime-id) AND records the shop-minted id X as task_id (the NEW envelope echo). outcome/findings/abstract come from the envelope. Provenance: DESIGN-MANDATED - the landed producer parses outcome/findings/abstract only (scripts/Envelope.psm1 Get-StarcarEnvelope) and writes neither task_id nor subject_basis; this vector lands red-first for the echo. Claude stop + transcript shapes OBSERVED from scripts/tests/fixtures/payloads/stop-car.json + transcript-car.jsonl.

transcript: {"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Do the task and end with the envelope."}]}}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Report body.

```starcar-artifact
task-id: 47-car-r1
outcome: done
findings: none of note.
abstract: The adapter car finished the fixture task.
```
"}]}}

record.subject: a1b2c3d4e5f6a7b8c
record.abstract: The adapter car finished the fixture task.
